name: RGGI CO2 Allowance Auction Results
contamination_reasoning: Auctions are discrete, irregularly-spaced events (roughly quarterly but subject to schedule changes). The exact timing and clearing prices of future auctions cannot be pretrained on.
difficulty_note: Auctions are heavily influenced by regulatory regime shifts and market sentiment, making the event timing and clearing price highly non-trivial to forecast.
adapter_notes: Scrape the historical results tables (CSV/HTML) and monitor the page or RSS for new auction announcements and results. No auth required.
verify: Confirm the structure of the results tables and the frequency of page updates.

name: Setlist.fm Concert Event Stream
contamination_reasoning: Live music event occurrences are highly localized, specific event streams. The exact timing of venue setlists and concert dates post-cutoff cannot have been seen.
difficulty_note: Concerts have complex seasonality (summer festival spikes) but are heavily disrupted by external shocks (e.g., pandemics, artist cancellations), making event-rate forecasting non-trivial.
adapter_notes: Requires requesting an API key. Query for recent setlists or artist tours and aggregate to an irregular time series of events.
verify: Confirm the historical depth of the API and rate limits.

name: TenneT Grid Maintenance and Outage Notifications
estimated_length: Varies; rolling 12-month forward and historical window
contamination_reasoning: Grid maintenance and unplanned outages are operational events that depend on weather, equipment failures, and load forecasts. Future event timing is unpublished until officially notified.
difficulty_note: Outage events follow clustered, regime-switching patterns driven by weather extremes and maintenance schedules, creating highly irregular inter-arrival times.
adapter_notes: Requires scraping the TenneT transparency dashboard. Look for JSON endpoints backing the UI or parse the HTML tables directly. No auth needed.
verify: Check if TenneT provides a direct API or if scraping is strictly necessary; verify data history length.

name: Australian BOM Severe Weather Warnings
contamination_reasoning: Severe weather warning issuance times and spatial extents are entirely contingent on developing meteorological conditions. The exact timestamps of future warnings cannot exist in any pretraining corpus.
difficulty_note: Warning counts and duration distributions are highly skewed, peaking during extreme weather seasons but with highly unpredictable onset times.
adapter_notes: Parse the state-specific XML feeds (e.g., IDZ00059.warnings_vic.xml). Aggregate to count new warnings per irregular interval. No auth required.
verify: Verify the RSS/XML feed structure and update frequency.
_vet_reasons: already proposed on 2026-07-05 (status=rejected, seen 1x) — propose a genuinely new source

name: eBird Recent Notable Observations
license: eBird API Key Required (Free for research)
estimated_length: Up to 30 days per request; historical via bulk
contamination_reasoning: Citizen science checklist submissions are highly idiosyncratic, spiking massively during 'Global Big Day' events and weekends. Unlikely to be in any standard TSFM pretraining set due to its niche nature.
difficulty_note: Observation rates exhibit strong multi-seasonality and extreme variance during birding events, which a naive seasonal model would completely fail to capture.
adapter_notes: Requires generating a free API key from the eBird developer portal. Poll the recent observations endpoint and aggregate counts to an irregular event stream.
verify: Ensure the free API key provides sufficient rate limits for the benchmark's polling needs.
_vet_reasons: already proposed on 2026-07-05 (status=proposed, seen 1x) — propose a genuinely new source

name: Transport for Ireland (TFI) Real-Time Passages
contamination_reasoning: Real-time vehicle passage events at stops are subject to daily traffic, weather, and passenger load shocks. Future exact passage timestamps are unknown.
difficulty_note: Transit arrivals are highly irregular at the second/minute level, requiring models to handle complex lagged dependencies and traffic-induced noise.
adapter_notes: Open API. Poll the real-time vehicle passages endpoint. Will require mapping stops/routes and aggregating arrivals to form an irregular event stream.
verify: Check the API documentation for authentication requirements and data format (likely GTFS-RT).

name: GitLab Statuspage Incidents
contamination_reasoning: Cloud platform outages are operational events. The timing and duration of future service disruptions are inherently unpredictable.
difficulty_note: Incident counts are zero-inflated with sudden bursts of activity. Models must handle long periods of calm followed by clustered failures.
adapter_notes: Standard Statuspage API. Fetch incidents.json and aggregate by component and time bucket. No auth required.
verify: Ensure the API returns historical incidents, not just active ones.
_vet_reasons: already proposed on 2026-07-05 (status=proposed, seen 1x) — propose a genuinely new source
